summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LLM Council Configuration Dashboard. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI fully functional with proper navigation, settings management, and document upload capabilities. Configuration flow works as expected with proper validation and error handling.
passed_tests: Backend Health Check API (GET /) - Returns correct status and configuration info
Backend Configuration API (GET /api/config) - Returns proper config structure
Backend Configuration Update API (PUT /api/config) - Successfully updates settings
Backend API Key Validation (POST /api/config/validate-key) - Correctly validates/rejects keys
Backend Available Models API (GET /api/models/available) - Returns 32+ models with proper structure
Backend Document List API (GET /api/documents) - Returns document list
Backend Document Upload API (POST /api/documents/upload) - Successfully uploads and processes files
Backend Document Delete API (DELETE /api/documents/{id}) - Successfully deletes documents
Backend Custom Model API (POST /api/models/custom) - Adds custom models correctly
Frontend Settings Page Loading - All 4 tabs (API Settings, Council Models, Chairman Model, Advanced) load correctly
Frontend Navigation - Chat/Settings navigation works properly
Frontend API Key Input - Input field present and functional
Frontend API Key Validation - Validation button works with proper error messages
Frontend Council Models - 33 model checkboxes displayed and functional
Frontend Chairman Model - Dropdown with 34 options works correctly
Frontend Model Selection - Toggle functionality works for selecting/deselecting models
Frontend Theme Settings - Light/Dark theme options available
Frontend Configuration Required Message - Properly displayed when API key not set
Frontend Settings Redirect - Correctly redirects to settings when trying to create conversation without API key
Frontend Button Accessibility - All buttons are clickable and properly styled
Frontend Form Validation - Proper validation messages displayed
Code Quality - Both Python backend and JavaScript frontend pass linting with no issues
